message:
fix(command): strict slot/port validation and conformance test expansion

- Add InvalidSlot error variant for out-of-range slot errors
- Fix CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT/COUNTKEYSINSLOT to reject invalid slots
  instead of clamping (0-16383 required)
- Fix MIGRATE port parsing to use parse_i64_arg for strict validation
- Fix WAIT numreplicas validation with parse_i64_arg
- Add conformance tests for EXPIRE/PEXPIRE negative seconds behavior
- Add conformance tests for CLUSTER slot validation edge cases
- Add conformance tests for COPY DB/REPLACE option validation
- Add conformance tests for MIGRATE port validation
- Add conformance tests for blocking command edge cases
- Remove duplicate WAIT negative timeout test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
